===Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Animated Trailer===
[[File:Steven Stone ORAS Trailer.png|thumb|250px|Steven Stone in the animated trailer]]
Steven briefly appeared in the [[Pokémon Omega Ruby and Pokémon Alpha Sapphire Animated Trailer]]. He was the final Trainer that {{ga|Brendan}} battled.
